rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Build stage reported 'completed' with zero files created on disk. Never trust build status alone — verify actual file existence via Glob or fs reads.","scope":"pipeline"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The task directory contains only metadata; the referenced codebase paths (src/collections/, src/utils/, src/auth/) don't exist yet. Files must be created fresh, not modified.","scope":"new-project-setup"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When a stage shows status=completed but zero files exist, check whether the build step actually wrote to the correct working directory vs a stale/empty directory.","scope":"pipeline"}]}
